runtime_gains: more reasons people need permits escorts seals audits hearings and registry entries
more local officials below named rulers
stronger reasons for caravans tribunals shrines depots and route towers to matter
more lawful and illicit economies operating in parallel
more believable social texture in underbuilt blocs

bloc_feels.Soreheim Alliance: A giant-led quota civilization with layered industrial governance and restorative law.
bloc_feels.Sheresh Communes: A cold-survival research commonwealth where infrastructure maintenance is civic life.
bloc_feels.Psanan: A volcanic matriarchal forge polity with dense compressed legal-industrial hierarchy.
bloc_feels.Nomdara Caravan: A true mobile state-form carrying law diplomacy trade and mediation in motion.

next_stage: named role families under every anchor

next_stage_note: The next correct step is not another high-level matrix but a conversion of this structure into a session-ready population engine.
